title: How can grassland farmers be empowered to clearly demonstrate how they deliver a range of ecosystem services for society?
description: A policy brief outlining the development of a farm‐level Decision Support Tool to assist grassland farmers in assessing and demonstrating six key ecosystem services using user‐friendly, evidence‐based metrics. It also examines farmer perceptions of existing tools and offers policy recommendations to support the DST’s further development, dissemination, and adoption.
